privileged_info_summary: The task uses Nuxeo Platform 10.10 with real PDF documents (quarterly_report.pdf converted to Contract_Template.pdf). The setup creates a document 'Remote Work Policy' in workspace '/default-domain/workspaces/HR-Workspace/Remote-Work-Policy' with initial version 1.0, which is published to section '/default-domain/sections/HR-Intranet'. The document is then updated to version 2.0 in the workspace. The agent must update the publication in HR-Intranet to contain the version 2.0 proxy. All metadata values (paths, version label, and title) are hardcoded in the setup script and verified against Nuxeo REST API documentation and standard document versioning behavior.
